rationale: The cited paper is highly topically aligned with the citing study: both examine stock-market value effects of new product announcements/preannouncements, including short-window CARs and long-run return interpretation. The citing note explicitly frames itself as extending prior innovation event-study work and reinterpreting announcement returns under expectations, making this 2007 JMKR article a plausible theory/method and direct comparison source rather than an incidental mention.
